title: gollama configuration
description:
Configuration for gollama, a terminal user interface for managing Ollama models.
https://github.com/sammcj/gollama#configuration

columns.description: Columns to show in the model list.

ollama_api_key.description: API key sent to Ollama-compatible endpoints.

strip_string.description: String to strip from model names for display.

editor.description: Editor command used when opening files.

docker_container.description: Docker container name used when managing models through Docker.
